product_overview: Project Ledger is a web-based financial project management platform to track incomes, expenses, budgets, partners and settlements across multiple projects and currencies. It provides project-scoped ledgers, partner management, and cross-project reports for freelancers and small teams.
core_goals: Provide a single, auditable ledger for project-based finances (income, expenses, obligations) across multiple currencies
Make it easy to manage projects, partners, and partner settlements with clear role-based access
Offer fast, filterable monthly and cross-project reports and dashboards for financial visibility
Enable reliable user authentication and account management with secure session handling
Surface actionable errors and validation feedback to prevent bad data entry

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new account using email and password and be redirected into the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill name and email -> Fill password -> Submit registration form -> See dashboard at /dashboard
Navigate to /register -> Submit registration form with missing required fields -> See inline validation errors

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate with email and password; the page waits for auth context initialization before allowing input.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Wait for spinner "Verificando sesión activa..." to clear and email input to appear -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> Be redirected to /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Wait for spinner to clear -> Fill email with wrong credentials -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> See error toast
Navigate to /login -> Wait for spinner to clear -> Submit login form with empty fields -> See required validation errors

features.name: Password Recovery
features.description: Request a password reset email using the password recovery form.
user_flows: Navigate to /forgot-password -> Enter registered email -> Submit recovery form -> See confirmation that reset instructions were sent
Navigate to /forgot-password -> Enter unregistered or invalid email -> Submit recovery form -> See error message

features.name: Dashboard (Monthly Overview)
features.description: Monthly financial snapshot across projects with navigation, project scoping, summary cards and charts.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard (auth required) -> See monthly summary cards (Total Income, Total Expenses, Net Balance) -> Select a project from the project selector to scope data -> Navigate to previous/next month -> View top categories and payment methods charts
Navigate to /dashboard while authenticated -> No data exists for period -> See empty state and guidance for creating first transactions
Navigate to /dashboard while not authenticated -> Be redirected to /login

features.name: Project Management (Create / Edit / Delete)
features.description: Create, view, edit and delete projects; each project records a base currency and appears in project lists.
user_flows: Navigate to /projects -> Open create project modal -> Fill project name and currency -> Submit create form -> See new project in the projects list
Navigate to /projects -> Open edit project flow for an existing project -> Change project details -> Submit edit form -> See updated project in the list
Navigate to /projects -> Attempt to create project with missing name -> Submit form -> See inline validation errors
Navigate to /projects -> Trigger project deletion for a project -> Confirm deletion in dialog -> Verify project is removed from the list

features.name: Project Members Management
features.description: Invite, change role and remove members from a project.
user_flows: Navigate to /projects/[projectId]/members -> Enter invitee email and select role -> Submit invite -> See invited member appear in member list
Navigate to /projects/[projectId]/members -> Change an existing member role -> Save role change -> See updated role reflected in the member list
Navigate to /projects/[projectId]/members -> Attempt to invite with invalid email -> Submit invite -> See inline validation error

features.name: Project Expenses
features.description: Track money going out of a project with full CRUD and filters.
user_flows: Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Expenses tab -> See expenses list or empty state -> Open new expense form -> Fill title, amount, date, category, payment method -> Submit expense form -> See new expense in list
Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Expenses tab -> Edit an existing expense -> Change amount -> Submit edit form -> See updated expense in list
Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Expenses tab -> Open new expense form -> Submit with missing amount -> See inline validation error
Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Expenses tab -> Delete an expense -> Confirm deletion -> See expense removed from list

features.name: Project Incomes
features.description: Track money coming into a project with full CRUD and filters.
user_flows: Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Incomes tab -> See incomes list or empty state -> Open new income form -> Fill required fields (title, amount, date) -> Submit income form -> See new income in list
Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Incomes tab -> Edit an income -> Submit changes -> See updated income in list
Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Incomes tab -> Open new income form -> Submit with missing required fields -> See inline validation errors
Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Incomes tab -> Delete an income -> Confirm deletion -> See income removed from list

features.name: Project Categories
features.description: Create and manage categories used to classify project transactions.
user_flows: Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Categories tab -> Open new category form -> Fill name and optional color -> Submit form -> See new category in list
Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Categories tab -> Edit a category name or color -> Submit changes -> See updated category in list
Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Categories tab -> Attempt to create category without name -> Submit form -> See inline validation error
Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Categories tab -> Delete a category -> Confirm deletion -> See category removed from list

features.name: Project Budget
features.description: Define and monitor budgets at project and category level with utilization indicators.
user_flows: Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Budget tab -> Set a project-level budget amount -> Save budget -> See budget utilization and progress bars per category
Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Budget tab -> View progress bars showing actual vs budget per category -> Identify categories over budget
Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Budget tab -> Attempt to set invalid budget amount (negative) -> Submit -> See inline validation error

features.name: Project Obligations
features.description: Track commitments such as invoices and recurring costs tied to a project.
user_flows: Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Obligations tab -> Open new obligation form -> Fill title, amount and due date -> Submit obligation form -> See new obligation in list
Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Obligations tab -> Edit obligation due date or amount -> Submit edit -> See updated obligation
Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Obligations tab -> Create obligation with missing required fields -> Submit -> See inline validation error
Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Obligations tab -> Delete an obligation -> Confirm deletion -> See obligation removed from list

features.name: Project Partners & Settlements
features.description: Assign partners to projects, view partner balances, and create/delete settlements between partners.
user_flows: Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Partners tab -> View partner balances or empty state -> Open settlement creation flow -> Enter from partner, to partner and amount -> Submit settlement -> See settlement listed and partner balances updated
Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Partners tab -> Remove an existing settlement -> Confirm deletion -> See settlement removed and balances updated
Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Partners tab -> Attempt to create settlement with invalid amount (e.g., zero or negative) -> Submit -> See inline validation error

features.name: Project Settings — Partner Assignment
features.description: Assign global partners to a specific project with split percentages and prevent total splits exceeding 100%.
user_flows: Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Settings tab -> Find Partners section -> Select a partner and enter a split percentage -> Add partner assignment -> See partner appear with assigned split
Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Settings tab -> Attempt to add a partner assignment that causes total splits to exceed 100% -> Submit -> See error blocking the addition
Navigate to /projects/[projectId] -> Switch to the Settings tab -> Remove a partner assignment -> Confirm removal -> See partner assignment removed

features.name: Partners Directory
features.description: Global partner directory to create, view, edit and delete partners and inspect associated projects and balances.
user_flows: Navigate to /partners -> View partners list or empty state -> Open new partner modal -> Enter name (required) and optional contact details -> Submit create form -> See new partner in list
Navigate to /partners -> Open a partner detail at /partners/[partnerId] -> Edit partner information -> Save changes -> See updated partner details
Navigate to /partners -> Search for partner by name -> See filtered results or empty state
Navigate to /partners -> Open a partner detail -> Delete partner -> Confirm deletion -> See partner removed from directory

features.name: Payment Methods
features.description: Manage user-scoped payment methods used across projects for transactions.
user_flows: Navigate to /payment-methods -> View payment methods list or empty state -> Open create payment method flow -> Fill name, type, currency and account details -> Submit form -> See new payment method in the list
Navigate to /payment-methods -> Open a payment method detail at /payment-methods/[id] -> Edit payment method info -> Save changes -> See updated details
Navigate to /payment-methods -> Delete a payment method -> Confirm deletion -> See method removed and transactions still reference appropriate payment data
Navigate to /payment-methods -> Attempt to create payment method without required name -> Submit -> See inline validation error

features.name: Workspaces
features.description: Group related projects under named workspaces and manage workspace lifecycle.
user_flows: Navigate to /workspaces -> View workspace list or empty state -> Open create workspace modal -> Fill name and optional description -> Submit create form -> See new workspace in list
Navigate to /workspaces -> Open workspace detail at /workspaces/[workspaceId] -> See list of projects in workspace
Navigate to /workspaces -> Attempt to create workspace with missing name -> Submit -> See inline validation error

features.name: Reports
features.description: Cross-project financial reports with multiple tabs and common filters for date range, project and partner.
user_flows: Navigate to /reports -> Select the Expenses tab -> Apply date range and project filters -> See aggregated expense totals and trend lines
Navigate to /reports -> Select the Partner Balances tab -> Apply project filter -> See net balance per partner or empty state if no data
Navigate to /reports -> Apply filters that result in no data -> See empty state and suggestions for changing filters

features.name: Settings — Profile, Security, Appearance
features.description: Manage user profile, change password, and select UI theme preferences.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings/profile -> Update full name or avatar -> Save profile -> See confirmation and updated profile values
Navigate to /settings/security -> Enter current password and new password -> Submit password change -> See success confirmation
Navigate to /settings/security -> Enter incorrect current password -> Submit password change -> See inline or toast error
Navigate to /settings/appearance -> Select a theme (Light/Dark/Cosmic) -> Save appearance -> See theme applied immediately

features.name: Admin — User Management
features.description: Admin panel for system-level user management including search, activation and deletion.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/users (auth required with admin role) -> View paginated user list -> Search users by email or name -> See filtered results
Navigate to /admin/users -> Deactivate an active user -> Confirm action -> See user marked as inactive
Navigate to /admin/users -> Delete a user -> Confirm deletion -> See user removed from list

tech_stack.other: React 19, Zod, React Hook Form, Sonner (toasts), Recharts

routes.description: Landing page with Log in / Register links
Email + password login form. Shows "Verificando sesión activa..." spinner on initial load while auth context initializes.
Monthly financial overview with project selector, month navigation, charts, and summary cards
Project detail with tabs - Expenses, Incomes, Categories, Budget, Obligations, Partners, Settlements, Settings
Project member management (invite, change role, remove)
Partner detail with associated projects and balances
Payment method detail with associated transactions
Financial reports with 6 tabs - Expenses, Incomes, Payment Methods, Partner Balances, Partner General, Workspace
Appearance settings - theme selection (Light, Dark, Cosmic)
Billing page with current plan and upgrade options
Admin panel - user list with search, activate/deactivate, delete
Help page with n8n chat widget

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password. Page shows auth-check spinner on load before showing the form.
user_interactions: Navigate to /login
Wait for spinner "Verificando sesión activa..." to clear and email input to appear
Fill email input field
Fill password input field
Click "Log in" button
On success - redirected to /dashboard
On failure - error toast appears

features.name: Login Form Validation
features.description: Client-side validation on the login form
user_interactions: Submit form with empty fields - see required validation errors
Submit form with invalid email format - see email validation error
Submit form with wrong password - see error toast

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Monthly financial overview. Works with empty data (new user). Shows project selector, month nav, summary cards, charts.
user_interactions: View monthly summary cards (Total Income, Total Expenses, Net Balance)
Navigate to previous/next month
Select a project from the project dropdown to scope data
View empty state when no data exists
View top categories and payment methods charts

features.name: Partners Directory
features.description: Global partner directory. Create, view, edit, delete partners.
user_interactions: View partners list (or empty state)
Click "New partner" button to open create modal
Fill name (required), email, phone, notes
Submit to create partner
Click a partner to open its detail page
Edit partner name/info from detail page
Search for partners by name
Delete partner from detail page
View associated projects and balances on detail page

features.name: Payment Methods
features.description: User-scoped payment methods list. Create, view, edit, delete.
user_interactions: View payment methods list (or empty state)
Click "New payment method" button to open create modal
Fill name (required), type (bank/cash/card), currency, bank name, account number
Submit to create payment method
Click a payment method to open its detail page
Edit payment method info
Delete payment method
View associated incomes/expenses on detail page

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Create, list, view, edit, delete projects. Each project has a base currency.
user_interactions: View projects list (cards layout, or empty state)
Click "New" button to open create modal
Fill project name (required), description, currency
Submit to create project
Click a project card to open its detail
Click the options menu on a project card to edit or delete
Confirm deletion in dialog

features.name: Project Settings Tab - Partner Assignment
features.description: Inside a project's Settings tab, assign global partners to the project with a split percentage.
user_interactions: Open project detail page
Click Settings tab
Find the Partners section
Select a partner from the dropdown
Enter a split percentage (0-100)
Click "Add partner" to save
System blocks adding if total split exceeds 100%
Remove a partner from the project

features.name: Project Expenses Tab
features.description: Track money going out of a project. Full CRUD with filters.
user_interactions: Click Expenses tab on project detail
View expenses list or empty state
Click "New expense" button
Fill title, amount, date, category, payment method
Submit to create expense
Edit an existing expense
Delete an expense
Filter by date range, category, payment method

features.name: Project Incomes Tab
features.description: Track money coming into a project. Full CRUD with filters.
user_interactions: Click Incomes tab on project detail
View incomes list or empty state
Click "New income" button
Fill title (required), amount (required), date (required), category, payment method
Submit to create income
Edit an existing income
Delete an income
Filter by date range, category, payment method

features.name: Project Categories Tab
features.description: Project-scoped categories for classifying transactions.
user_interactions: Click Categories tab on project detail
View categories list or empty state
Click "New category" button
Fill name (required), description, color
Submit to create category
Edit category name and color
Delete a category

features.name: Project Budget Tab
features.description: Define and track budget per project and per category.
user_interactions: Click Budget tab on project detail
View budget utilization or empty state
Set a budget amount for the project
View progress bars showing actual vs budget per category
Delete an existing budget

features.name: Project Obligations Tab
features.description: Track financial commitments - invoices, contracts, recurring costs.
user_interactions: Click Obligations tab on project detail
View obligations list or empty state
Click "New obligation" button
Fill title (required), amount (required), due date, description
Submit to create obligation
Edit an obligation's due date or amount
Delete an obligation

features.name: Project Partners Tab
features.description: View partners assigned to project and their balances/settlements.
user_interactions: Click Partners tab on project detail
View partner balances or empty state
View settlement suggestions
Create a settlement between partners
Delete a settlement
See net balance per partner

features.name: Project Delete
features.description: Delete a project from the projects list using the options menu.
user_interactions: Go to /projects
Click options menu (three dots) on a project card
Click "Delete"
Confirm deletion in the confirmation dialog
Verify project disappears from the list

known_limitations.issue: Login page shows "Verificando sesión activa..." spinner on initial load. Must wait for email input to be visible before interacting with the form.
known_limitations.impact: Tests that fill login form must use wait_for_selector('input[type="email"]') before filling fields

known_limitations.issue: Project Settings tab for partner assignment may be under Settings tab not Partners tab depending on UI state
known_limitations.impact: Navigate to Settings tab within project detail to assign partners
